articles.title: 'And the award goes to...' - Try our football in film quiz
articles.summary: Test yourself on moments when football appears in films.

articles.title: Slot still searching for solution to conceding late goals
articles.summary: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot admits to not having the answers to his side's troubles conceding late goals this season.

articles.title: 'A moment he'll never forget' - Rooney on Dowman goal
articles.summary: Match of the Day pundit Wayne Rooney describes Max Dowman becoming the youngest goalscorer in Premier League history as a "moment he'll never forget" and argues it will bring those connected to Arsena...

articles.title: 'Carrick-type and a destroyer' - Neville says Man Utd need at least two midfield signings
articles.summary: Gary Neville says Manchester United need to bring in at least two top central midfielders in the summer transfer window and has laid out the profile of signings his former clu...

articles.title: We have to wake up - Szoboszlai warning sums up Liverpool plight
articles.summary: Liverpool have been here far too often this season. Another late, late goal costing them points as they drew 1-1 with struggling Tottenham.

articles.title: Spurs answer Tudor's call with show of fight in the face of crisis
articles.summary: Spurs interim coach Igor Tudor told his players they could "cry or fight". BBC Sport chief football writer Phil McNulty saw a display of defiance to draw at Liverpool.

articles.title: Have Old Firm wrestled title momentum away from Hearts?
articles.summary: After wins for Celtic and Rangers and a defeat for leaders Hearts, what next in the captivating Scottish Premiership title race?

articles.title: Carrick continues to make case for permanent Man Utd role
articles.summary: Wayne Rooney calls on Manchester United to give Michael Carrick the manager's job after boosting their hopes of Champions League qualification.

articles.title: Man Utd stay third with win against lacklustre Villa
articles.summary: Goals from Matheus Cunha and Benjamin Sesko help Manchester United fend off an attempted Aston Villa comeback, to win 3-1 at Old Trafford in the Premier League.

articles.title: Guardiola sympathises - but can he help Haaland out of rut?
articles.summary: Erling Haaland's struggles in front of goal come from playing in "the most difficult position on the planet", says Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola.

articles.title: James stars as Chelsea beat Man Utd in Women's League Cup final
articles.summary: Lauren James gets on the scoresheet to put Chelsea on their way to a 2-0 win over Manchester United in the Women's League Cup Final at Ashton Gate.

articles.title: Ten-man Leeds earn point at Palace after Calvert-Lewin penalty miss
articles.summary: Leeds United play out a goalless draw with Crystal Palace after Dominic Calvert-Lewin's missed first-half penalty is compounded by Gabriel Gudmundsson's sending off at Selhurst Park in the Premier Lea...

articles.title: Forest earn point against Fulham to move out of relegation zone
articles.summary: Nottingham Forest play out a goalless draw with Fulham at the City Ground to move out of the bottom three of the Premier League.

articles.title: Fernandes is a joy to watch - Rooney
articles.summary: Match of the Day pundit Wayne Rooney analyses Bruno Fernandes' crucial role in Manchester United's 3-1 win over Aston Villa at Old Trafford in the Premier League.

articles.title: Serial winners Chelsea block out noise to triumph again
articles.summary: No matter what form Chelsea are in, winning trophies feels inevitable - and they did it again in the Women's League Cup.
